title: Support for Auto number column in API
excerpt:
Hi there, 
One of our customer has a requirement for which we need to access the value in the Auto number column. 
But the documentation says that this is currently not supported by the API - Auto number 
Is there a plan…

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

One of our customer has a requirement for which we need to access the value in the Auto number column.

But the documentation says that this is currently not supported by the API - Auto number

Is there a plan to support this in the near future?

Thank you.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @kranthi_thoughtflow ,

I do not have an ETA on when this could change in the future.

Having said that, I have changed this topic into a request so that other users can vote for it

Cheers,
Matias
